steps.t: The home of Authi Gem-cutter and his family can be found in the south-western corner of the Dwelling-halls of Erebor.
Authi Gem-cutter is in the Jewelstead, the Gem-cutter family home in the Dwelling-halls of Erebor.
Mother Amma is in the Jewelstead, the Gem-cutter family home in the Dwelling-halls of Erebor.

The entrance to the New-lodes of Narathâk is located east of the Dwelling-halls, beyond the passage that runs from the entryway to the Hall Under the …
Authi Gem-cutter's brother Gráfar is in the New-lodes of Narathâk.
Authi's brother Gráfar Splitstone has asked you to carry a crate of precious stones back to Mother Amma in the Jewelstead. The Gem-cutter family home …
Mother Amma has asked you to pick up the finely-crafted necklace and deliver it to Erfith, the customer who requested it. Erfith can be found on the w…
Erfith the Quarrelsome is on the west side of the Dwelling-halls of Erebor, east of the Jewelstead and down the stairs.
Authi Gem-cutter is in the Jewelstead, the Gem-cutter family home in the Dwelling-halls of Erebor.
